title: FormClosing vs Minimize-to-Tray Race Condition
description: GUI form closure event must be gated by $script:_ForceClose flag. Without it, minimize-to-tray triggers 'GUI form closed by user' log and process termination. File>Exit and Tray>Exit must show confirmation dialog before setting _ForceClose=$true.
notes: Implemented in Session 6: Added confirmation dialog to File>Exit and Tray>Exit. FormClosing handler cancels close and minimizes unless _ForceClose=true. Regression detection: ensure _ForceClose is never set without user confirmation.
